name: C2C Gold Corp.
summary: C2C Gold Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral projects in Newfoundland, Canada. The company holds interests in the Millertown, Badger, and Barren Lake projects that comprises 4,605 claims covering an area of approximately 1,151 square kilometers located in the Central Newfoundland Gold Belt. It also holds interests in various gold projects in White Gold and Klondike districts in Yukon, Canada. The company was formerly known as Taku Gold Corp. and changed its name to C2C Gold Corp. in December 2020. C2C Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
